mapper.select: SELECT b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.description, b.cover_image, b.publish_date, b.created_at, b.updated_at, c.category_name, COUNT(bc.copy_id) AS total_copies, SUM(CASE WHEN bc.status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS available_copies FROM book b LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN book_copy bc ON b.book_id = bc.book_id GROUP BY b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.description, b.cover_image, b.publish_date, b.created_at, b.updated_at, c.category_name ORDER BY b.created_at DESC

SELECT b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.description, b.cover_image, b.publish_date, b.created_at, b.updated_at, c.category_name, COUNT(bc.copy_id) AS total_copies, SUM(CASE WHEN bc.status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS available_copies FROM book b LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN book_copy bc ON b.book_id = bc.book_id WHERE 1=1
AND (b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND b.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM book_copy bc2 WHERE bc2.book_id = b.book_id AND bc2.status = 'AVAILABLE' )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM book_copy bc2 WHERE bc2.book_id = b.book_id AND bc2.status = 'AVAILABLE' )
GROUP BY b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.description, b.cover_image, b.publish_date, b.created_at, b.updated_at, c.category_name ORDER BY b.created_at DESC

SELECT b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.description, b.cover_image, b.publish_date, b.created_at, b.updated_at, c.category_name, COUNT(bc.copy_id) AS total_copies, SUM(CASE WHEN bc.status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS available_copies FROM book b LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN book_copy bc ON b.book_id = bc.book_id WHERE b.book_id = #{bookId} GROUP BY b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.description, b.cover_image, b.publish_date, b.created_at, b.updated_at, c.category_name

SELECT b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.description, b.cover_image, b.publish_date, b.created_at, b.updated_at, c.category_name, COUNT(bc.copy_id) AS total_copies, SUM(CASE WHEN bc.status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS available_copies FROM book b LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN book_copy bc ON b.book_id = bc.book_id WHERE b.category_id = #{categoryId} GROUP BY b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.description, b.cover_image, b.publish_date, b.created_at, b.updated_at, c.category_name ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book ( title, author, publisher, isbn, category_id, description, cover_image, publish_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{isbn}, #{categoryId}, #{description}, #{coverImage}, #{publishDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET title = #{title}, author = #{author}, publisher = #{publisher}, isbn = #{isbn}, category_id = #{categoryId}, description = #{description}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.book_id) FROM book b INNER JOIN book_copy bc ON b.book_id = bc.book_id WHERE bc.status = #{status}

SELECT b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.description, b.cover_image, b.publish_date, b.created_at, b.updated_at, c.category_name, COUNT(bc.copy_id) AS total_copies, SUM(CASE WHEN bc.status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS available_copies FROM book b LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN book_copy bc ON b.book_id = bc.book_id LEFT JOIN rental r ON bc.copy_id = r.copy_id GROUP BY b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.description, b.cover_image, b.publish_date, b.created_at, b.updated_at, c.category_name ORDER BY COUNT(r.rental_id) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.description, b.cover_image, b.publish_date, b.created_at, b.updated_at, c.category_name, COUNT(bc.copy_id) AS total_copies, SUM(CASE WHEN bc.status = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS available_copies FROM book b LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN book_copy bc ON b.book_id = bc.book_id GROUP BY b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.publisher, b.isbn, b.category_id, b.description, b.cover_image, b.publish_date, b.created_at, b.updated_at, c.category_name ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
